'''7EX''' was one of the many [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2-series super battle droids]] deployed by the CIS during the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]. It was destroyed by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on the [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]], while acting as a security [[Droid/Legends|droid]] for [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].

{{Droid-stub}}
